pageContext.name: Silver Surfer Rebirth #1
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dynamic Forces are excited to present the Silver Surfer Rebirth #1 Signed Comic Book!  They're back! No, we don't mean the guys on the cover… we're talking about legendary creators Ron Marz and Ron Lim returning to tell a story set during their fan-favorite run of Silver Surfer!  Someone has stolen the Reality Gem, an object that allows the user to fulfill any wish no matter the consequences. Whoever has taken it is doing things like bringing back the dead hero Captain Mar-Vell. It's up to Silver Surfer to team up with the least likely of allies, Thanos, to find the Gem and restore reality to its proper form.   Don't miss your chance to add this comic book signed by the incomparable Ron Marz to your Marvel collection today!
